title: ci: add zizmor workflow for GitHub Actions security scanning
body:
## Problem

Skopeo has no zizmor workflow. Podman already runs zizmor on PRs and main (`.github/workflows/zizmor.yml`).

## Why

Skopeo's GHA migration pins action SHAs in `ci.yml`, but there is no automated check that those pins stay valid or secure.

## Proposed fix

Add a `zizmor.yml` workflow mirroring podman's setup.

## Related

- Podman reference: `.github/workflows/zizmor.yml`
- Part of the Cirrus → GHA migration follow-up
